prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 536→546→475→376→587 名，近五年波动较大，2023–2024 年连续前移后 2025 年明显后移至 587 名，较 2024 年后移约 211 名，2025 年为基准位次约 587 名；该校在湖南省物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 59 人，2023 年 61 人，2024–2025 年降至 51 人，2026 年计划 54 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 3 人，扩招约 5.9%，对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年排名第 5 名（2021 年第 6 名→2022–2026 年第 5 名），稳居全国顶尖梯队，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及师德师风、学校管理类事件），但 2025 年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学 A++ 等科研成果）；抖音热度总排名第 4（高热），综合热度超 1074 万，短视频曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续升温；历史投档异常信号未见明显断档记录；复旦大学 A- 及以上学科达 27 个，涵盖数学 A+、物理学 A+、化学 A、生物学 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、电子科学与技术 A、临床医学 A、公共卫生与预防医学 A+ 等，与物理类招生专业（数学类、工科试验班各方向、自然科学试验班、经济学类等）高度匹配，学科实力对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息 /通信、电气工程等物理类核心专业大类 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐；本省物理类考生数 2021 年 20.6 万→2025 年 32.0 万→2026 年 34.7 万，逐年递增，2026 年较 2025 年增加约 2.7 万人（+8.4%），竞争压力持续加大，呈下降趋势，但位次竞争仍由考生总数驱动；复旦大学位于上海，属一线城市，对湖南省考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次明显后移、2026 年小幅扩招（+3 人）、本省物理类考生增加约 8.4%、学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热、优势学科群极强等因素，考虑考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧，小幅上调预测位次。预测最低位次约 620 名，区间 549–691 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 536→546→475→376→587 respectively, showing significant fluctuations in the past five years. After consecutive advances in 2023–2024, the ranking notably moved back to 587 in 2025, approximately 211 places behind 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 587. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 59 students in both 2021 and 2022, 61 in 2023, dropped to 51 in 2024–2025, and is planned at 54 for 2026, a slight expansion of 3 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 5.9%, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (6th in 2021→5th from 2022 to 2026), firmly in the top tier nationally, maintaining strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving teacher ethics, school management incidents), but in 2025, reputation was slightly positive (e.g., A++ in Journalism and Communication for research achievements). Douyin heat total ranking 4th (high heat), comprehensive heat over 10.74 million, extremely high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention. No obvious gaps in historical admission anomaly signals. Fudan University has 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mathematics, A+ in Physics, A in Chemistry, A+ in Biology, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Electronic Science and Technology, A in Clinical Medicine, A+ in Public Health and Preventive Medicine, etc., highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors (Mathematics, Engineering Experimental Class in various directions, Natural Science Experimental Class, Economics, etc.), with strong discipline strength attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core Physics Category majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province was 206,000 in 2021→320,000 in 2025→347,000 in 2026, increasing year by year, with an increase of about 27,000 (+8.4%) in 2026 compared to 2025, continuously intensifying competition pressure, showing a downward trend, but ranking competition is still driven by total candidate numbers. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Hunan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant ranking decline in 2025, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3 students), an 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, slightly negative university reputation but high Douyin heat, and extremely strong advantageous disciplines, the predicted ranking is slightly adjusted upward due to intensified competition from the expanded candidate pool. The predicted minimum ranking is about 620, with a range of 549–691.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan/Shannon Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Innovation College/Leading Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuit and Micro-Nano Electronics Innovation College/Leading Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (Mathematics Intelligence Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information Innovation College/Leading Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Robot and Advanced Manufacturing Leading Talent Class)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Elite Class)
- Financial Technology (Full English Course Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (Elite Class)
- Chemistry (Elite Class)
- Physics (Physics Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 549–691, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Engineering Experimental Class in Future Information/Integrated Circuit direction, Data Science), use Tier 1 majors (Xianghui Academy/Shannon Plan, Computing and Intelligent Leading Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Biological Sciences, Chemistry, Physics Elite Class) as safe choices. All Physics Category majors at Fudan University in 2026 require Physics + Chemistry as elective subjects; candidates should pay attention to subject matching when applying.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次分别为 95→105→111→93→112 名，整体在 93–112 名窄幅波动，2025 年基准位次约 112 名，近 3 年累计后移约 19 名；该校在湖南省历史类计划 2021–2023 年均为 13 人，2024 年增至 16 人，2025 年降至 11 人，2026 年计划 11 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学 2024 年分化观望（但五院四系中复旦法学 A- 仍具吸引力）、汉语言/中文推荐、新闻传播 2023 年明显劝退（但复旦新闻传播学 A+ 属顶尖水平）；本省历史类考生数 2021 年 16.6 万→2025 年 14.3 万→2026 年 18.7 万，2026 年较 2025 年大幅增加约 4.4 万人（+31.2%），竞争压力显著加剧，呈下降趋势；复旦大学位于上海，一线城市对文科考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次 112 名、2026 年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生大幅增加约 31.2%、学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热、文科优势学科群极强等因素，考虑考生规模激增带来的竞争显著加剧，小幅上调预测位次。预测最低位次约 120 名，区间 106–134 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 95→105→111→93→112 respectively, fluctuating narrowly between 93 and 112. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 112, with a cumulative backward shift of about 19 positions over the past 3 years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 13 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 16 in 2024, decreased to 11 in 2025, and remains at 11 for 2026, unchanged from 2025 with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, firmly in the top tier nationally, highly attractive to top liberal arts students. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (incidents related to teacher ethics and school management), but in 2025, reputation was positive (A++ in Journalism and Communication and other research achievements). Douyin popularity ranks 4th overall (high heat), with comprehensive heat exceeding 10.74 million, indicating extremely high application attention. No significant gaps in historical admission records. Fudan University has 27 disciplines rated A- or above, directly related to History Category enrollment majors include: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Political Science A+, Law A-, Sociology A, Theoretical Economics A+, Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, etc., placing its disciplinary strength at the forefront among national liberal arts institutions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 shows differentiation and wait-and-see attitude (but Fudan's Law A- among the Five Academies and Four Schools still attractive), Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Journalism and Communication significantly discouraged in 2023 (but Fudan's Journalism and Communication A+ is top-tier). The number of History Category examinees in the province was 166,000 in 2021 → 143,000 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026, with a substantial increase of about 44,000 (+31.2%) in 2026 compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition, showing a downward trend. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal to liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking of 112, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a significant increase of about 31.2% in provincial History Category examinees, slightly negative university reputation but high Douyin heat, and extremely strong liberal arts advantage disciplines, the prediction slightly raises the ranking due to intensified competition from the surge in examinee numbers. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 120, with a range of 106–134.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law
- Economics (including Mathematical Economics Honors Class, Economics International Program UIPE).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Social Sciences Experimental Class (School of International Relations and Public Affairs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 106–134, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Social Sciences Experimental Class) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (History) as safety options. All Fudan University History Category majors in 2026 require first choice History, with no additional subject restrictions; pay attention to subject matching when applying.
